title: Anjelique Loveless
summary: A corrupt Shieldmarshal captain who used Flint Beastwood's own evidence to frame him and embody the city's compromised law.
concept: Compromised authority figure whose betrayal turns official law into one of the campaign's main threats.
role: corrupt Shieldmarshal captain / betrayer / institutional blocker

background.history: Flint Beastwood turned evidence linking Ambrost Mugland to a larger criminal network over to Captain Anjelique Loveless. By the next morning, Loveless had used that same evidence to frame Flint and force him into hiding.
background.reasonInStory: She is the face of corrupted authority and false justice inside Alkenstar.

currentSituation.overview: Loveless still stands as the institutional reason Flint cannot return openly to the law he once served.
currentSituation.currentProblem: Her past framing job becomes more dangerous if Flint reconnects with allies, recovers evidence, or proves ties between her and Mugland.
currentSituation.currentLeverage: Rank, legal machinery, and the ability to weaponize official procedure against targets.

motivations.shortTerm: Keep Flint discredited and prevent sensitive evidence from resurfacing.
motivations.midTerm: Protect the arrangement between compromised law and the wider corruption web.
motivations.longTerm: Maintain authority and survive any exposure that reaches upward or sideways through the system.

presentation.behavior: Controlled, official, and dangerous because she can make injustice look procedural.

gmUse.sceneFunction: High-level law antagonist, betrayal trigger, and face of procedural corruption.
gmUse.whatTheyKnow: She knows how Flint's evidence was buried and likely knows what parts of the anti-corruption case had to be redirected or suppressed.
gmUse.howToEscalate: Issue warrants, lean on checkpoints and armories, or force allies inside the Shieldmarshals to choose loyalty or truth.
gmUse.fallbackUse: Use Loveless to turn any corruption lead into immediate legal danger.

campaignFitSummary: Directly tied to false charges, corrupted law enforcement, and Mugland-adjacent coverups. Best used in investigation, betrayal, and law-versus-reality scenes.
notes: Current repo detail comes primarily through Flint Beastwood's file. Exact appearance and wider biography are still undefined in the subtree.

relations.note: Loveless framed Flint using the evidence he brought her.
She is the core actor behind Flint's false charge and flight.
Flint's mid-term goal is to prove Loveless and Mugland are connected.
